sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Union Pacific appoints CF Industries CEO Tony Will to board of directors
feed.summary: Union Pacific Corporation announced the appointment of W. Anthony "Tony" Will, CEO of CF Industries Holdings, to its Board of Directors, effective January 6, 2026. Will, who plans to retire from CF Industries on January 4, 2026, brings extensive leadership experience to the $142 billion market cap railroad giant. This move follows strong financial performance and strategic approvals for Union Pacific, including overwhelming shareholder support for a merger with Norfolk Southern.

feed.title: Petroleo Brasileiro S.A.- Petrobras (NYSE:PBR) Plans $0.07 Special Dividend
feed.summary: Petroleo Brasileiro S.A.- Petrobras (NYSE:PBR) has declared a special dividend of $0.0658 per share, payable on March 27th to shareholders of record on December 26th. The dividend is well-covered, with a current payout ratio of 28.7% and projected future payout ratio of 22.6%, supported by analysts' EPS estimates of $3.10 for next year. The company's stock shows strong financial metrics, including a P/E ratio of 5.64 and recent earnings beat.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on AES: "I've Taken a Liking to It Down Here"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer expressed a positive outlook on The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES), seeing a buying opportunity due to its current valuation despite past dislikes. This perspective comes as AES benefits from significant data center demand for renewable energy, with recent rumors of takeover interest further boosting stock potential. However, the article also suggests that certain AI stocks might offer greater upside with less risk.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on J.B. Hunt: “I Think the Long Trucking Recession’s Over”
feed.summary: Jim Cramer recommended J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ: JBHT), stating that the long trucking recession is over, especially with an anticipated Fed rate cut benefiting transport stocks. Parnassus Investments also holds J.B. Hunt, despite recent sluggishness, believing it is well-positioned for recovery when freight demand improves. The article highlights Cramer's optimism for the transport sector.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Praises FedEx CEO
feed.summary: Jim Cramer has highlighted FedEx Corporation (NYSE:FDX) as a recommended stock, especially for the holiday season, praising CEO Raj Subramaniam. He described FedEx as a "coiled spring" with a fantastic setup, anticipating strong performance similar to J.B. Hunt and ArcBest. Cramer believes the stock could climb above $300, attributing its potential success to Subramaniam's leadership.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Says Target "Could Roar If It Can Demonstrate Any Sort of Turnaround"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer commented on Target (NYSE: TGT) after the Fed rate cut, suggesting that retailers, including Target, could perform well if the Fed continues to cut rates. Despite a recent dispiriting earnings report with a revenue miss and a decline in same-store sales, Cramer believes Target "could roar if it can demonstrate any sort of turnaround." The company is anticipating a new CEO in February, Michael Fiddelke, who has plans to improve merchandise and implement technology to revitalize the business.

feed.title: Jim Cramer says “industrials always work in response to a rate cut” and highlights 3M Company
feed.summary: Jim Cramer highlighted industrials as a sector that performs well in response to interest rate cuts. He specifically mentioned 3M Company as a stock to watch in this context. This suggests Cramer views 3M as a potential beneficiary of a more accommodative monetary policy environment.

feed.title: Apollo, KKR wooed by Jared Kushner to join Ukraine’s postwar reconstruction: NYP
feed.summary: Jared Kushner has reportedly approached investment firms Apollo Global Management and KKR & Co. Inc. to engage them in the postwar reconstruction efforts for Ukraine. Kushner, who was a key figure in past peace negotiations, is seeking their support for the rebuilding of the war-torn country, according to The New York Post.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Expects a "Breakout Quarter" From FedEx
feed.summary: Jim Cramer expressed bullish sentiment towards FedEx, predicting a "breakout quarter" for the company. Ariel Investments also highlighted FedEx's potential due to cost efficiencies, the planned spin-off of FedEx Freight, and operational improvements despite economic uncertainties. The company provides transportation, shipping, and logistics services globally.

feed.title: │Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Is Investigating Semler Scientific, Inc. (SMLR) And Encourages Stockholders to Connect
feed.summary: │Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has launched an investigation into Semler Scientific, Inc. (SMLR) for potential corporate wrongdoing. The firm is encouraging stockholders who purchased Semler securities before March 10, 2021, and still hold them, to come forward and assist in the investigation. Investors can visit the firm's website or contact them directly for more information.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Highlights Southwest Air CEO’s Enthusiasm Around the Company’s Prospects
feed.summary: Jim Cramer noted the enthusiasm of Southwest Airlines Co. CEO, Bob Jordan, regarding the company's prospects, especially following collaboration with activist investors at Elliott Management. Cramer observed that Southwest Air and Alaska Air have seen significant gains since November. He also referenced a previous comment where he called Southwest Airlines a "Delta camp" stock that was cheap but might not remain so, highlighting that LUV stock has since risen nearly 65%.

feed.title: MSCI Isn't Wrong to Be Cautious on DATs
feed.summary: MSCI's potential exclusion of digital asset treasuries (DATs) from its indexes is a cautious and valid move, considering the significant risks and structural issues associated with many of these investment vehicles. While some established DATs like Strategy are robust, the rapid proliferation of new, highly leveraged, and often poorly structured DATs poses substantial risks to investors, particularly amid crypto market downturns. The author argues that MSCI's stance is a necessary step for investor protection and a sign of the crypto market's integration into traditional finance, which will ultimately strengthen legitimate digital asset firms.

feed.title: Taking Stock of Sempra (SRE): Assessing Valuation After Recent Share Price Cooling
feed.summary: Sempra (SRE) has seen a recent 4% share price slip over the past month, contrasting with positive longer-term returns, which presents an intriguing valuation opportunity. While a narrative fair value suggests Sempra is 12.2% undervalued due to major LNG export projects, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model indicates it may be slightly overvalued at its current price of $88.49. Investors are prompted to consider both the upside potential from LNG growth and potential challenges from regulatory shifts and volatile global LNG demand.

feed.title: Preferred Bank (NASDAQ:PFBC) Reaches New 12-Month High After Dividend Announcement
feed.summary: Preferred Bank (NASDAQ:PFBC) recently hit a new 52-week high after announcing a dividend of $3.20 per share, payable on January 20th to shareholders of record by January 6th, representing a 327% yield. The bank beat quarterly EPS estimates and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts with an average target price of $104.67. Institutional investors have significantly adjusted their positions in the company, with 72.77% of the stock owned by them.

feed.title: Stock Traders Buy Large Volume of Call Options on General Mills (NYSE:GIS)
feed.summary: Stock traders recently showed significant interest in General Mills (NYSE:GIS), purchasing 10,534 call options, which is 79% above the daily average. This activity occurred as shares traded up to $46.52. The company announced a quarterly dividend of $0.61, offering a 5.2% yield, despite some recent analyst downgrades, with the stock currently rated as a "Hold" by most analysts.

feed.title: General Dynamics (GD) Valuation Check as Shares Cool After Strong Year-to-Date Rally
feed.summary: General Dynamics (GD) shares have cooled slightly after a 29% year-to-date rally, falling about 3% in the last month to $337.49. Despite the recent dip, Simply Wall St's analysis suggests the stock is still 11.4% undervalued compared to a fair value of $381, driven by robust order intake in defense and growth in Mission Systems and GDIT. Investors should consider the potential for supply chain issues and contract delays, which pose risks to the current upside thesis.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on NRG: “I think it’s a very well-run company”
feed.summary: This article is a placeholder indicating a title and an empty content body. It suggests that financial analyst Jim Cramer has expressed a positive opinion about NRG, calling it "a very well-run company." However, no further details or context are provided in the current content.

feed.title: Saratoga Investment Corp Announces Monthly Dividend of $0.25 (NYSE:SAR)
feed.summary: Saratoga Investment Corp (NYSE:SAR) declared a monthly dividend of $0.25 per share, leading to an annualized yield of 13.0%. Despite the attractive yield, concerns exist regarding dividend sustainability due to a high payout ratio of 90.4% and projected future earnings potentially not covering the dividend. The company's recent earnings also missed analyst expectations, with the stock currently trading at $23.03.

feed.title: Equity Residential to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.69 (NYSE:EQR)
feed.summary: Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.6925 per share, payable on January 16th to shareholders of record by January 2nd. Despite a current high payout ratio of 205.2%, analysts anticipate future earnings per share of $4.21, which would comfortably cover the annualized dividend of $2.77. The company currently holds a "Hold" rating from Wall Street analysts with an average target price of $70.02.

feed.title: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) Increases Dividend to $0.88 Per Share
feed.summary: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) announced a quarterly dividend increase to $0.8775 per share, payable on January 31st to shareholders of record on January 7th. This 6.0% increase brings the annualized dividend yield to 6.0%, supported by a payout ratio of approximately 54% and expected earnings per share of $5.76 next year. The company's stock recently traded up 0.5% at $58.21, and its quarterly earnings beat consensus estimates.

feed.title: First Trust NASDAQ-100 Equal Weighted Index Fund (NASDAQ:QQEW) Declares Dividend Increase - $0.19 Per Share
feed.summary: First Trust NASDAQ-100 Equal Weighted Index Fund (NASDAQ:QQEW) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.1878 per share, marking a 74.4% increase from its previous dividend. The dividend is payable on December 31st to shareholders of record on December 12th, implying an annualized yield of about 0.5%. The ETF, which tracks an equal-weighted NASDAQ-100 index, has a market cap of approximately $1.91 billion.

feed.title: Preferred Bank to Issue Annual Dividend of $3.20 (NASDAQ:PFBC)
feed.summary: Preferred Bank (NASDAQ:PFBC) has declared an annual dividend of $3.20 per share, payable on January 20th to shareholders of record on January 6th, representing a dividend yield of 327.0%. The dividend is well-covered with a payout ratio of 30.6% and the bank has consistently increased its dividend for the past five years. Analysts expect the company to earn $10.20 per share next year, supporting the dividend.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Considers Delta "Kind of the Biggest and Best in the Airlines"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer has expressed a positive outlook on Delta Air Lines (NYSE: DAL), referring to it as "kind of the biggest and best in the airlines." He noted the travel sector's strong rebound from November lows and highlighted that Delta's estimated $200 million pre-tax profit hit from a government shutdown was less severe than anticipated. Cramer cited a Delta 8-K filing indicating healthy demand for the December quarter and strong trends for early 2026, reinforcing his bullish sentiment.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on Cisco: "This Company's at the Heart of the AI Revolution"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer views Cisco (CSCO) as an undervalued tech company central to the AI revolution despite its low price-to-earnings multiple compared to peers. He highlights the company's strong product order growth, solid balance sheet, and recent earnings and revenue increases. Cramer's Charitable Trust invested in Cisco due to its cheap valuation and CEO Chuck Robbins's reinvention efforts, dismissing concerns about an AI bubble akin to the dot-com era.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Notes “Expedia’s the Cheaper Stock” Compared to Booking
feed.summary: Jim Cramer recommends Expedia Group (EXPE) over Booking Holdings (BKNG), citing Expedia's lower valuation despite strong earnings growth projections. He highlights that Expedia is trading at a significantly cheaper multiple of next year's earnings compared to Booking, making it a more attractive investment in the online travel agency sector. Cramer believes that both companies will benefit from a resilient consumer market.

feed.title: Royal Bank Of Canada Has Lowered Expectations for JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) Stock Price
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has reduced its price target for JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) to $330 from $343, while maintaining an "outperform" rating, indicating a potential 3.5% upside. Despite this, JPMorgan reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with an EPS of $5.07 and revenue of $47.12 billion. The overall analyst consensus for JPM is a "Hold" with an average target price of $326.81, reflecting mixed opinions among analysts.

feed.title: Moffett Nathanson Raises Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) Price Target to $172.00
feed.summary: Moffett Nathanson has raised its price target for Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) to $172.00 from $166.00, while maintaining a "neutral" rating, indicating an 8.66% potential upside. Despite this, broader analyst sentiment is more bullish with an average target of $199.05 and a majority of "Buy" ratings. Insider selling has been noted, including CEO Andrew Power selling over 53,000 shares, while institutional investors hold a significant portion of the company's stock.

feed.title: TD Cowen Increases CVS Health (NYSE:CVS) Price Target to $105.00
feed.summary: TD Cowen has raised its price target for CVS Health (NYSE:CVS) to $105.00 from $100.00 and maintained a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 30.63% upside. Several other brokerages have also increased price targets or reiterated positive ratings following CVS's strong Q3 earnings beat and positive FY2025 guidance. CVS Health reported earnings of $1.60 per share on revenue of $102.87 billion, surpassing analyst expectations.

feed.title: Duke Energy and county officials to test sirens around Brunswick Nuclear Plant
feed.summary: Duke Energy and county officials will conduct siren tests around the Brunswick Nuclear Plant on Wednesday, January 7th. Residents in the area may hear sirens sound for 5 to 30 seconds between 10 AM and 11 AM, but no action is required. These tests are performed to ensure the sirens are fully functional, with some potentially being tested multiple times.

feed.title: Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) Price Target Lowered to $19.00 at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has lowered its price target for Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) to $19.00 from $20.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating and suggesting a 7.27% upside. The company's average rating is "Reduce" with a consensus target price of $20.33 based on analysis from various firms. Despite beating quarterly EPS estimates, Conagra's quarterly revenue declined year-over-year, though it provided FY2026 guidance of $1.70-$1.85 EPS.

feed.title: bEquinix (EQIX) Valuation Check as Long-Serving CFO Announces Retirement and Transition to Special Advisor
feed.summary: Equinix (EQIX) is undergoing a significant leadership change as its longtime CFO announces retirement, impacting investor sentiment. Despite a recent share price decline, the stock is estimated to be undervalued by nearly 40% according to one intrinsic value estimate and 30% under analyst targets. However, its high P/E ratio compared to industry peers raises questions about whether the current valuation fully accounts for future growth.

feed.title: Assessing Amgen (AMGN)’s Valuation After FDA Approval of Uplizna for Generalized Myasthenia Gravis
feed.summary: Amgen (AMGN) recently received FDA approval for Uplizna, a CD19 targeted B cell therapy for generalized myasthenia gravis, leading to a reassessment of its long-term growth prospects. The stock has seen a robust year-to-date return of approximately 22% and a one-year total shareholder return of over 21%, currently trading around $317.74. While analysts project a fair value of $322.88, indicating it is slightly undervalued, this depends on the company's ability to navigate biosimilar pressure and drug price reform.

feed.title: Third Point LLC Buys 754,204 Shares of Capital One Financial Corporation $COF
feed.summary: Third Point LLC significantly increased its stake in Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) by 71.8%, acquiring an additional 754,204 shares, bringing its total ownership to 1,804,204 shares valued at $383.9 million. This makes Capital One the hedge fund's fourth-largest position, representing 5.0% of its portfolio. Other major institutions like Vanguard and State Street also boosted their holdings, contributing to a strong institutional ownership of 89.84%, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $262.70.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean "crowns" new beach club with 43 foot tall logo
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean has installed a giant 43-foot Crown & Anchor logo at its new Royal Beach Club Paradise Island, making it one of the largest physical symbols of its kind. This beach club is set to open on December 23, 2025, with day passes available for purchase, unlike the included admission at Perfect Day at CocoCay. Royal Caribbean also has two other beach clubs planned for Cozumel and Santorini.

feed.title: American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) Price Target Raised to $125.00 at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. raised its price target for American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) to $125.00 from $121.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating and suggesting a 9.4% upside. This adjustment follows AEP's Q3 revenue increase of 10.9% to $6.01 billion and its FY2025 EPS guidance of $5.85-$5.95, despite missing Q3 EPS estimates by $0.01. The stock currently has a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $126.09.

feed.title: Citigroup Initiates Coverage on Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY)
feed.summary: Citigroup has initiated coverage on Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) with a "neutral" rating and a $567 price target, suggesting an 8.3% upside. This rating is in line with the broader analyst consensus of a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $601.38. Teledyne recently surpassed Q3 earnings estimates and raised its FY2025 guidance.

feed.title: Truist Financial Downgrades M&T Bank (NYSE:MTB) to Hold
feed.summary: Truist Financial has downgraded M&T Bank (NYSE:MTB) from a "Buy" to a "Hold" rating, setting a new price target of $217.00. This implies a potential upside of 5.57% from the stock's previous close, despite other analysts maintaining "Buy" ratings with various price targets. The report also highlights recent insider selling activity and institutional investor holdings in M&T Bank.

feed.title: Sociedad Quimica y Minera (NYSE:SQM) Lowered to "Neutral" Rating by Citigroup
feed.summary: Citigroup downgraded Sociedad Quimica y Minera (NYSE:SQM) from a "buy" to a "neutral" rating, setting a $74 price target that implies a 14% upside. This contrasts with the average analyst price target of $53.39 and the consensus "Hold" rating. The company recently reported quarterly EPS of $0.62, missing estimates, on $1.17 billion in revenue, with the stock currently trading near its 52-week high.

feed.title: Citigroup Initiates Coverage on Huntington Ingalls Industries (NYSE:HII)
feed.summary: Citigroup has initiated coverage on Huntington Ingalls Industries (NYSE:HII) with a "Buy" rating and a $376 price target, indicating a potential 15.3% upside. This follows HII's recent strong quarterly performance, where it beat EPS expectations and saw significant revenue growth. Despite Citigroup's positive outlook, the MarketBeat consensus remains a "Hold" with a lower price target, reflecting a mixed analyst sentiment and recent insider share sales.

feed.title: Robert Baldwin Jr Purchases 10,392 Shares of Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) Stock
feed.summary: Robert Baldwin Jr., a Director at Global Payments Inc., recently purchased 10,392 shares of the company's stock for approximately $846,117, increasing his total holdings to 59,303 shares. This transaction, revealed in an SEC filing, occurred on December 11th with an average price of $81.42 per share. Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) had recently reported strong quarterly earnings and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share.

feed.title: EQT (NYSE:EQT) Stock Price Expected to Rise, Mizuho Analyst Says
feed.summary: Mizuho has increased its price target for EQT (NYSE:EQT) to $68 from $60, maintaining an "outperform" rating and suggesting a 21.1% upside. This comes amidst a general "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts, with an average price target of $64.78. EQT recently surpassed its Q3 EPS estimates, and its revenue saw a 52.6% year-over-year increase.

feed.title: Oric Pharmaceuticals Advances Key Cancer Drug Toward Late-Stage Trials
feed.summary: Oric Pharmaceuticals Inc. (ORIC) presented promising Phase 1b clinical data for enozertinib (ORIC-114) at the ESMO Asia congress, showing activity in various NSCLC patient groups with specific genetic mutations. The company is considering advancing enozertinib into Phase 3 trials and has secured a strategic partnership with Janssen for combination therapy, with sufficient financial runway until mid-2028. Despite a minor stock decline, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $19.67.

feed.title: Vestis Corporation $VSTS is Vision One Management Partners LP's 2nd Largest Position
feed.summary: Vision One Management Partners LP significantly increased its stake in Vestis Corporation to become its second-largest holding, valued at $20.57 million. Despite insider buying by the CEO and director, analysts maintain a "Strong Sell" consensus rating with an average price target of $5.95, even as the company reported Q3 earnings that met expectations.

feed.title: Third Point LLC Reduces Stock Position in Telephone and Data Systems, Inc. $TDS
feed.summary: Third Point LLC decreased its stake in Telephone and Data Systems, Inc. (NYSE:TDS) by 0.5% in the second quarter, selling 35,000 shares to own a total of 6,725,000 shares. This position now represents approximately 5.90% of TDS and 3.1% of Third Point’s portfolio. Meanwhile, TDS's Chief Accounting Officer, Anita J. Kroll, significantly reduced her personal holding by 94.9% through the sale of 16,217 shares.

feed.title: Lacklustre Performance Is Driving LCI Industries' (NYSE:LCII) Low P/E
feed.summary: LCI Industries (NYSE:LCII) has a low P/E ratio of 16.4x compared to the broader market, which is attributed to its projected growth lagging behind the market's forecast. Despite a recent 38% increase in earnings over the last year, the company's EPS has fallen 62% over three years, leading investors to expect limited future growth and consequently a reduced valuation for the stock. This suggests that without pleasant surprises in future earnings, the share price is unlikely to see strong upward movement soon.

feed.title: \SL Green Realty (NYSE:SLG) Price Target Cut to $47.00 by Analysts at Mizuho
feed.summary: Mizuho has cut its price target for SL Green Realty (NYSE:SLG) from $67.00 to $47.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating. This adjustment implies a potential upside of 5.24% from the prior close. Despite mixed analyst opinions, with an average price target of $58.65, SL Green Realty recently surpassed earnings expectations, reporting $1.58 EPS against an estimated $1.34 and $244.8 million in revenue.

feed.title: Selling US$836k Of Odyssey Marine Exploration Stock Rewarded Insiders
feed.summary: While Odyssey Marine Exploration (NASDAQ:OMEX) shareholders saw their stock rise 13%, insiders sold US$836k worth of shares in the past year, primarily by Juan Cortina Gallardo. This sale occurred at a price lower than the current stock value, suggesting insiders may have considered the earlier price fair. Despite this, insiders still own 15% of the company, indicating some alignment with shareholders.

feed.title: SoundHound AI, Inc Faces Stock Turbulence Amid Market Volatility
feed.summary: SoundHound AI, Inc. (SOUN) has seen an 8.12% stock price decline despite positive analyst upgrades, including a raised price target of $15 from Mizuho Securities and Cantor Fitzgerald. The company reported increased revenue but also a significant GAAP net loss, coupled with negative insider sentiment due to increased selling. The stock's performance is further impacted by broader market volatility in the AI sector, even as SoundHound pursues strategic partnerships like its integration with OpenTable for conversational in-vehicle voice AI.

feed.title: Soleno Therapeutics Stock Poised for Growth as Wolfe Research Issues Positive Rating
feed.summary: Soleno Therapeutics (SLNO) has received an 'Outperform' rating from Wolfe Research with a $75 price target, despite past profitability challenges and a high price-to-sales ratio. The company's stock is up 5.07% amid positive sentiment, buoyed by strong liquidity and a strategic focus on reversing a slowdown in patient starts. This optimistic outlook positions SLNO for potential growth, making it a stock to watch for traders monitoring market reactions and strategic developments.

feed.title: Skyworks Solutions (NASDAQ:SWKS) sheds US$349m, company earnings and investor returns have been trending downwards for past five years
feed.summary: Skyworks Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ:SWKS) has seen its share price fall by 55% over the last five years, with a 26% drop in the past year, indicating a negative sentiment among recent buyers. Both the share price and earnings per share (EPS) have declined over this period, suggesting the market is increasingly cautious about the company. Despite insider buying, future earnings are crucial for shareholders, and the total shareholder return (TSR) over five years, including dividends, was -49%.
